# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|robots.txt|sitemap.xml|manifest.json|.*\\.(?:png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|svg|ico|css|js|map|txt|xml)$).*)',
  ],
}

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES = ['auth_token', 'access_token', 'token']
const REFRESH_COOKIE_NAMES = ['refresh_token']

const PUBLIC_PATH_PREFIXES = ['/login', '/signup', '/forgot-password', '/reset-password', '/public']
const PUBLIC_EXACT_PATHS = ['/', '/healthz']

const AUTH_ROUTES = ['/login', '/signup', '/forgot-password', '/reset-password']

const DEFAULT_LOGIN_PATH = '/login'
const DEFAULT_AUTHENTICATED_REDIRECT = '/app'

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  if (PUBLIC_EXACT_PATHS.includes(pathname)) return true
  return PUBLIC_PATH_PREFIXES.some((p) => pathname === p || pathname.startsWith(p + '/'))
}

function isAuthRoute(pathname: string): boolean {
  return AUTH_ROUTES.some((p) => pathname === p || pathname.startsWith(p + '/'))
}

function getCookie(req: NextRequest, names: string[]): string | undefined {
  for (const n of names) {
    const v = req.cookies.get(n)?.value
    if (v) return v
  }
  return undefined
}

function isLikelyJwt(token: string): boolean {
  const parts = token.split('.')
  if (parts.length !== 3) return false
  for (const p of parts) {
    if (!p || /[^A-Za-z0-9\-_]/.test(p)) return false
  }
  return true
}

function decodeJwtPayload(token: string): any | null {
  try {
    const parts = token.split('.')
    if (parts.length !== 3) return null
    const payload = parts[1].replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/')
    const padded = payload + '='.repeat((4 - (payload.length % 4)) % 4)
    const json = atob(padded)
    return JSON.parse(json)
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

function isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean {
  if (!isLikelyJwt(token)) return false
  const payload = decodeJwtPayload(token)
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') return false
  const exp = payload.exp
  if (typeof exp !== 'number') return false
  const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)
  return exp <= now
}

function buildLoginRedirect(req: NextRequest): NextResponse {
  const url = req.nextUrl.clone()
  const dest = url.pathname + (url.search || '')
  url.pathname = DEFAULT_LOGIN_PATH
  url.search = ''
  url.searchParams.set('next', dest)
  return NextResponse.redirect(url)
}

function redirectAuthenticatedAwayFromAuthRoutes(req: NextRequest): NextResponse {
  const url = req.nextUrl.clone()
  url.pathname = DEFAULT_AUTHENTICATED_REDIRECT
  url.search = ''
  return NextResponse.redirect(url)
}

export default function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl

  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    return NextResponse.next()
  }

  const token = getCookie(req, AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES)
  const refresh = getCookie(req, REFRESH_COOKIE_NAMES)

  const hasToken = !!token
  const tokenValid = !!token && (!isLikelyJwt(token) || !isTokenExpired(token))
  const isAuthenticated = tokenValid || !!refresh

  if (isAuthenticated && isAuthRoute(pathname)) {
    return redirectAuthenticatedAwayFromAuthRoutes(req)
  }

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return buildLoginRedirect(req)
  }

  const res = NextResponse.next()
  res.headers.set('x-authenticated', '1')
  if (hasToken && token && isLikelyJwt(token)) {
    const payload = decodeJwtPayload(token)
    if (payload?.sub) res.headers.set('x-user-id', String(payload.sub))
  }
  return res
}
